chemistry_overall: All candidates show insufficient residence time for target kinetics (τ_kinetics=60 min). Candidate 3 has hard-gate mixing failures and conversion below minimum threshold. All candidates show suboptimal conversion due to insufficient residence time. Candidate 6 has hard-gated mixing failure. All candidates show suboptimal conversion rates below 0.85 target, with candidate 7 performing best at 86.5% conversion despite long tubing length. All candidates show acceptable performance with minor kinetic limitations. Candidate 10 achieves target conversion despite long tubing.

All candidates show reasonable flow dynamics but suffer from insufficient residence time for target conversion in this cycloaddition reaction.

All candidates show suboptimal kinetics with conversions below 0.85 target. Candidate 6 has severe mixing limitations requiring diameter reduction. All candidates show acceptable fluidics with low pressure drops and reasonable Reynolds numbers. Conversion efficiency varies significantly across designs. safety_overall: All candidates show undersized residence times for optimal kinetics, with candidate 3 having critical mixing and conversion failures. All candidates show adequate pressure safety with low delta_P values well below pump limits. Candidate 6 has a hard gate failure for mixing criteria requiring blocking. All candidates operate safely within pressure limits with adequate BPR settings. Conversion efficiency varies significantly across designs. All candidates operate safely at 120°C with low pressure drops and adequate BPR settings. Conversion efficiency varies but all are within acceptable ranges.
